posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you love monday․com, and have an interesting story to tell? I’m looking to interview a few people who have discovered something surprising about their business, their team (or themselves) through using monday․com. It doesn’t have to be something huge or even something that saved you time or money… it just has to be something new you didn’t discover until you began using monday․com.

Please PM or contact me at deb@polishedgeek.com so we can set up a time to chat. And please share my contact info if you know someone who would be a good fit for an interview like this.

~ Deb Cinkus
Polished Geek

posts.author: RavitL (Ravit Levy )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PolishedGeek
Sure, you can check out our Success Stories where monday.com clients share their success!
